title: Security: DoS due to check missing
description_snippet:
**VULNERABILITY DETAILS**   
  
The function `vrend_inject_tcs` can be invoked when injecting a TCS(https://source.chromium.org/chromiumos/chromiumos/codesearch/+/main:src/third_party/virglrenderer/src/vrend_renderer.c;l=5406). Specifically, a new shader is allocated at the point[1]. However, it doe
